intro.title: Contributions
intro.description: Contributions span architecture leadership, standards participation, mentoring, and service to the wider technology ecosystem. This section highlights communities, recognition, and contribution areas that sit alongside delivery leadership.

profile.title: Profile & Expertise
profile.description: Expertise in aligning business objectives with robust technology strategies and delivery excellence across financial services, cloud modernization, and secure platform architecture.

categories.title: Standards & Communities
categories.description: Active participation across standards bodies and professional forums that shape secure, interoperable, and future-ready technology ecosystems.

categories.title: Mentorship & Enablement
categories.description: Ongoing mentorship and enablement across architecture maturity, security thinking, and long-term technology career development.

categories.title: Recognition & Service
categories.description: Recognition for sustained service, leadership, and contributions to professional communities and broader technology advancement.

categories.title: Publications & Media
categories.description: A growing contribution hub for talks, published material, and open technical assets that complement ecosystem participation and architecture leadership.
